Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The True Shape of Io's Steeple Mountain 70 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs 64 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac 170 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. Vector Meson Dominance 40 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. What Category Theory Teaches Us About DataFrames 43 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Significant progress made on Xbox 360 recompilation 129 upvotes, 25 comments
  7. Google releases Gemma 4 open models 1553 upvotes, 423 comments
  8. NHS staff refusing to use FDP over Palantir ethical concerns 111 upvotes, 27 comments
  9. Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents 548 upvotes, 188 comments
  10. Maze Algorithms (1997) 67 upvotes, 17 comments
  11. LinkedIn is searching your browser extensions 1779 upvotes, 724 comments
  12. C89cc.sh – standalone C89/ELF64 compiler in pure portable shell 144 upvotes, 46 comments
  13. Switzerland hosts 'CERN of semiconductor research' 24 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. Show HN: European alternatives to Google, Apple, Dropbox and 120 US apps 297 upvotes, 114 comments
  15. Decisions that eroded trust in Azure – by a former Azure Core engineer 880 upvotes, 378 comments
  16. Artemis II's toilet is a moon mission milestone 269 upvotes, 115 comments
  17. Samsung Magician disk utility takes 18 steps and two reboots to uninstall 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Good ideas do not need lots of lies in order to gain public acceptance (2008) 280 upvotes, 128 comments
  19. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 60 upvotes, 21 comments
  20. Tailscale's new macOS home 487 upvotes, 239 comments
  21. Intel Assured Supply Chain Product Brief 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  22. 'Fatal decision': EU slammed for caving to US pressure on digital rules 47 upvotes, 21 comments
  23. ESP32-S31: 320MHz 2C RV32IMAFCP+CLIC, 512KB SRAM, GbE, 802.11ax, 61 GPIO 79 upvotes, 44 comments
  24. Show HN: Home Maker: Declare Your Dev Tools in a Makefile 71 upvotes, 42 comments
  25. Cursor 3 447 upvotes, 340 comments
  26. H.264 Streaming Fees: What Changed, Who's Affected, and What It Means 27 upvotes, 14 comments
  27. Proton Meet Isn't What They Told You It Was 128 upvotes, 111 comments
  28. RiskReady-open-source GRC platform with MCP gateway and human-approved mutations 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Bun: cgroup-aware AvailableParallelism / HardwareConcurrency on Linux 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. ParadeDB (YC S23) Is Hiring Database Internal Engineers (Rust) 0 upvotes, 0 comments
